mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bs_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM bs_unit WHERE id = #{id} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM bs_unit WHERE deleted = 0 AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_unit (enterprise_id, name, unit_type, sub_category, remark, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{enterpriseId}, #{name}, #{unitType}, #{subCategory}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_unit
name = #{name}, unit_type = #{unitType}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_unit SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
